---
title: "Mini-Project #01 — Gourmet Cheeseburgers Across the Globe"
author: "Yashpal Saini"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
# Website output folder for GitHub Pages
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
---

> **Executive Summary (fill after analysis):** In this report we explore Netflix's Top 10 datasets (global and per-country), clean season titles, run quick EDA, answer nine exploratory questions, and draft three press releases (Stranger Things S5 hype, Netflix in India, and an open topic). Key highlights: *\[replace these bullets with inline results after running\]*.

## 0) Setup

\`\`\`{r} #\| label: pkg-setup \# Install/load packages (run install lines once as needed) if(!require("tidyverse")) install.packages("tidyverse") if(!require("lubridate")) install.packages("lubridate") if(!require("DT")) install.packages("DT") if(!require("stringr")) install.packages("stringr") if(!require("glue")) install.packages("glue") if(!require("knitr")) install.packages("knitr") if(!require("scales")) install.packages("scales")

library(readr) library(dplyr) library(tidyr) library(lubridate) library(DT) library(stringr) library(glue) library(scales)
